title: M.Sc. Biochemistry (2 Year)
content: The aim of the two-year postgraduate course in Biochemistry is to develop a scientific aptitude in the students and to motivate them for research in Biochemistry. The course will provide solid foundation for all the students regardless of background and will gain a comprehensive understanding of the fundamentals of Biochemistry to an advanced level, including clinical and research aspects and with the special attention to current development in the discipline. By the end of the course, students will gain expertise in the latest biochemical techniques and learn to the applications of the basic science to the field of modern research. Graduation in Botany/ Zoology/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Biomedical Sciences/ Genetics/ Medicine/ Agriculture/ Life Sciences/ Pharmacy from any recognized university or equivalent examination with a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate. Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit. There is a greater demand globally for trained manpower in the area of Biochemistry for Research and Development, in Multinational Companies, Public Sectors, Quality Control Labs, Biopharmaceuticals companies, Food industries as well as in Universities. The present curriculum is designed to cater to these needs. With a degree in Biochemistry, students can get opportunities in various fields like research organizations, pharmaceuticals industries, healthcare organizations, forensic science laboratories, environmental organizations and pursue higher education (M. Phil/ PhD) in institutions in India and abroad. 01 The M.Sc. Biochemistry programme is designed to provide an in-depth understanding of the molecular basis of life, integrating concepts of biomolecular structure, enzymology, metabolism, molecular biology, and cellular regulation. 02 It aims to develop research aptitude, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills through hands-on training and exposure to modern analytical techniques. 03 The programme bridges core biochemical knowledge with applications in biotechnology, medicine, and environmental science, while also fostering professional competencies such as scientific communication, data analysis, and ethical research practices. Graduates will be equipped for careers in research, academia, healthcare, and industry, and prepared for lifelong learning in an evolving scientific landscape. 01 02 03 Modern tool usage: Create, select, and apply appropriate techniques, resources, and modern science and research tools including prediction and modelling to complex scientific activities with an understanding of the limitations. 04 05 06 07 08 01 The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the world of biochemical science concepts through application based learning. 02 The graduates will be emphasized on applied aspects of advance biological techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude. 03 The graduates of biochemistry will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing, continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organization. 01 Developing deeper understanding of key concepts of basic and allied branches of Biochemistry such as molecular cell biology, immunology, microbiology, enzymology, cellular metabolism, biotechnology, clinical and industrial biochemistry. 02 Equip students with analytical and technical skills related to Biochemistry and allied subjects through application based learning such as use of audio visual aids, problem/project based learning, guest lectures, visits to industrial Graduation in Botany/ Zoology/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Biomedical Sciences/ Genetics/ Medicine/ Agriculture/ Life Sciences/ Pharmacy from any recognized university or equivalent examination with a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate. Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit.
